question: Considering the area chart of cost from 2018 to 2022, which statement is supported by the chart as drawn?

options.A: Cost was lowest in the final year.
options.B: Cost in the last two years is equal.
options.C: The chart does not clearly show how the two highest cost years compare because their values extend beyond the visible range.
options.D: Cost increased by the same amount every year.

explanation: The y-axis cap causes the top bars to be cut off, so they appear the same height although true values may differ.
